tagline: LineWise uses AI to capture expert knowledge and guide factory workers through real-time troubleshooting and training.

metrics.traction: 2x faster Employee Onboarding, 23 Hrs Saved Per User Monthly, 6 Months Payback Period

description: LineWise (YC X25) Raises $1.1M Pre-Seed Funding to End Costly Factory Downtime and Yield Loss. LineWise, the US-based AI-powered virtual engineer for manufacturers, has raised $1.1 million in pre-seed funding from A2D Ventures, Y Combinator, Exitfund, REMUS Capital, SBXi Fund, and Team Ignite Ventures.
whyInvest: • 6-month payback period and 23 hrs saved/user/month show strong traction • Team includes MIT/Imperial grads, McKinsey consultant, and serial AI entrepreneur • Addresses critical manufacturing skills gap with AI that captures tribal knowledge
raw_signal: LineWise (YC X25) Raises $1.1M Pre-Seed Funding to End Costly Factory Downtime and Yield Loss. LineWise, the US-based AI-powered virtual engineer for manufacturers, has raised $1.1 million in pre-seed funding from A2D Ventures, Y Combinator, Exitfund, REMUS Capital, SBXi Fund, and Team Ignite Ventures.
